---
title: "manuscript figures"
output: html_document
date: "2023-11-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load-libraries}
# library(Matrix)cd /
library(stringr)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
library(scDblFinder)
library(BiocParallel)
library(ArchR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(dittoSeq)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
# BiocManager::install("glmGamPoi")
# BiocManager::install("dittoSeq")
```

```{r set project}
set.seed(1234)
proj_name <- "FLCvNML"
```

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- readRDS('./revisedDataset/rds/FLCvNML_Named-obj.rds')
```

## Figure 1

### B

```{r Change color scheme}
levels(Idents(harmonized.seurat))
cols <- c("Liver epithelial cells 1" = "#0072B2",
             "Liver epithelial cells 2" = "#cab2d6",
             "Endothelial cells" = "#6a3d9a",
             "Liver epithelial cells 3" = "#DDCC77",
             "Liver epithelial cells 4" = "#ff7f00",
             "Stellate cells" = "#33a02c",
             "Liver epithelial cells 5" = "#AA4499",
             "Cholangiocyte cells" = "#CC6677",
             "Neutrophils and macrophages" = "#44AA99",
             "Lymphocytes" = "#8C87E6",
             "Liver epithelial 6" = "#FF6B6B",
             "Unknown" = "#b15928")

DimPlot(harmonized.seurat, reduction = "umap", label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.2,  cols = cols, raster = FALSE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.margin = margin(2.5, 3, 2.5, 2.5),
        legend.text=element_text(size=7)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title=NULL,
                              ncol=3, 
                              nrow=4,
                              override.aes = list(size = 6, shape = "square")))
ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/metadata/harmony/", proj_name, "_umap_clusterNamed-nonraster.png"), units = 'in', width = 6, height = 6.5, dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
DimPlot(harmonized.seurat, reduction = "umap", label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.2,  cols = cols, raster = FALSE, split.by = "status") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.margin = margin(2.5, 3, 2.5, 2.5),
        legend.text=element_text(size=7)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title=NULL,
                              ncol=3, 
                              nrow=4,
                              override.aes = list(size = 6, shape = "square")))
ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/metadata/harmony/", proj_name, "_umap_clusterNamed-split-nonraster.png"), units = 'in', width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 600)
```

### Cell type overlay

```{r}
dir.create("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers/noLabel")
```

```{r}
dir.create("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers")

for (gene in c("EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "FYN", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "NPPB","CYP3A4","RPS21","RPL4","S100A4","CFL1","TMSB4X","B2M","ACTG1","EEF1B2","COX7C","HNRNPA1","PARP8","MALAT1","CST7","COX4I1","ID2","ARHGAP15","CELF2","PTPRC","RPS27","UQCRB","RPS3","PPIA","TMSB10","FYN", "HNF4A")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```


## Figure 2

#### Heatmap using complexheatmap

```{r}
features = c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "LINC00473", "PDE10A","TAFA5", "TMEM163", "OAT", "CA12", "BACE2", "COL4A1",
    "FAM167A", "GPRIN3", "IRF4", "KIF26B", "TESC",
    "CD68", # Ross, H. M.et al.Fibrolamellar carcinomas are positive for CD68.Mod. Pathol.24,390–395 (2011)
    "SOX9", "SOX17", "PDX1", "POU5F1", "SALL4", "SHH", "NANOG", "KLF4", "SOX2", "BMI1", # Oikawa 2015
    "AGR2", #Wang, Z., Hao, Y. & Lowe, A. W. The adenocarcinoma-associated antigen,AGR2, promotes tumor growth, cell migration, and cellular transformation.Cancer Res.68,492–497  
    "PCSK1", #Malouf, G. G.et al.Transcriptional profiling of pure fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma reveals an endocrine signature.Hepatology59,2228–2237
    "KRT7", # Malouf G, Falissard B, Azoulay D, et al. Is histological diagnosis ofprimary liver carcinomas withfibrous stroma reproducibleamong experts? J Clin Pathol 2009;62(06):519–5248Abdul-Al HM, Wang G, Makhlouf HR, Goodman ZD. Fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma: an immunohistochemical comparisonwith conventional hepatocellular carcinoma. Int J Surg Pathol2010;18(05):313–318
    "TCN1", # D. L. Lildballe, K. Q. T. Nguyen, S. S. Poulsen, H. O. Nielsen,and E. Nexo, “Haptocorrin as marker of disease progressionin �brolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma,”European Journal ofSurgical Oncology
    "PRKACA", "DNAJB1")
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "GLI1", "GLI2", "GLI3", "BAG2", "STIP1", "OAT", "OTC", "LDHB", "SDS", "GLS", "ALDH18A1", "PYCR1", "PYCR2", "PRODH", "P4HA2", "CXCR4", "CXCL12", "SOX17", "GLS", "PDGFB", "PDGFRB", "WNT4", "FZD10", "VEGFA", "TGFB3", "TGFBR2", "TGFBR1", "KDR", "FLT1", "CTLA4", "GRAMD1B", "STIM1", "PKD2", "TMCO1", "SLC27A4", "ACSL5", "SLC27A3", "SLC27A2", "SLC27A1", "ACSL6", "CD36", "SLC16A7","SLC16A1", "LDHA", "SLC2A2", "HK2", "GCK", "PFKFB1", "PFKFB2", "G6PD", "TKT", "BPGM", "MINPP1", "ALDOA", "ALDOB", "ALDOC", "PFKP", "PFKL", "PFKM", "PKM", "PKLR", "SLC37A4", "PGK1", "ENO3", "KHK", "GK", "AKR1B1", "GPAM", "GPD1", "GPD1L", "GPD2", "ACLY", "IDH1", "ELOVL5", "BCAT1",  "PTPRB", "NPPB",  "CYP3A4", "FYN", "EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "HNF4A", "ENO3", "KHK", "GK", "AKR1B1", "GPAM", "GPD1", "GPD1L", "GPD2", "ACLY", "IDH1", "ELOVL5", "BCAT1",  "PTPRB", "NPPB",  "CYP3A4", "FYN", "EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "HNF4A", "CXCR4", "CXCL12", "PDGFA", "PDGFRA", "AGT", "AGTR1", "CXCL16", "CXCR6", "LOX", "ERBB2")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, split.by = "status", label.size = 3, label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.2, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("CD68")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, split.by = "status", label.size = 3, label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.2, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```

### Heatmap
### Using dittoSeq to make the heatmap (doesn't work)

```{r}
features = c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "LINC00473", "PDE10A","TAFA5", "TMEM163", "OAT", "CA12", "BACE2", "COL4A1",
    "FAM167A", "GPRIN3", "IRF4", "KIF26B", "TESC",
    "CD68", # Ross, H. M.et al.Fibrolamellar carcinomas are positive for CD68.Mod. Pathol.24,390–395 (2011)
    "SOX9", "SOX17", "PDX1", "POU5F1", "SALL4", "SHH", "NANOG", "KLF4", "SOX2", "BMI1", # Oikawa 2015
    "AGR2", #Wang, Z., Hao, Y. & Lowe, A. W. The adenocarcinoma-associated antigen,AGR2, promotes tumor growth, cell migration, and cellular transformation.Cancer Res.68,492–497  
    "PCSK1", #Malouf, G. G.et al.Transcriptional profiling of pure fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma reveals an endocrine signature.Hepatology59,2228–2237
    "KRT7", # Malouf G, Falissard B, Azoulay D, et al. Is histological diagnosis ofprimary liver carcinomas withfibrous stroma reproducibleamong experts? J Clin Pathol 2009;62(06):519–5248Abdul-Al HM, Wang G, Makhlouf HR, Goodman ZD. Fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma: an immunohistochemical comparisonwith conventional hepatocellular carcinoma. Int J Surg Pathol2010;18(05):313–318
    "TCN1", # D. L. Lildballe, K. Q. T. Nguyen, S. S. Poulsen, H. O. Nielsen,and E. Nexo, “Haptocorrin as marker of disease progressionin �brolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma,”European Journal ofSurgical Oncology
    "PRKACA", "DNAJB1", "CCN2") %>% 
  sort()
```

```{r}
getMetas(harmonized.seurat)
dittoDimPlot(harmonized.seurat, "cluster_named")

hm <- dittoHeatmap(harmonized.seurat, features = features,
    annot.by = c("cluster_named", "status"))
```

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- ScaleData(harmonized.seurat, features = rownames(harmonized.seurat))
```

```{r}
hm <- DoHeatmap(harmonized.seurat, features = features, group.by = "cluster_named")
hm
```


### Heatmap using Seurat Native features

```{r}
hm.d <- DoHeatmap(harmonized.seurat, features = features, group.by = "cluster_named", assay = "SCT", slot = "scale.data")
```

```{r}
png("./revisedDataset/manuscript/figure2/Heatmap_hm_d.png", width = 17, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
hm.d
dev.off()
```


### Heatmap using avg expression

```{r}
avg_expression.log <- AggregateExpression(harmonized.seurat, return.seurat = TRUE, group.by = c("ident", "status"), normalization.method = "LogNormalize")
avg_expression.clr <- AggregateExpression(harmonized.seurat, return.seurat = TRUE, group.by = c("ident", "status"), normalization.method = "CLR")
avg_expression.rc <- AggregateExpression(harmonized.seurat, return.seurat = TRUE, group.by = c("ident", "status"), normalization.method = "RC")
```

```{r}
new_order <- c("Liver epithelial cells 1_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 1_NML", 
               "Liver epithelial cells 2_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 2_NML", 
               "Liver epithelial cells 3_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 3_NML", 
               "Liver epithelial cells 4_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 4_NML", 
               "Liver epithelial cells 5_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 5_NML", 
               "Liver epithelial cells 6_FLC", "Liver epithelial cells 6_NML", 
               "Endothelial cells_FLC", "Endothelial cells_NML",
               "Stellate cells_FLC", "Stellate cells_NML",
               "Neutrophils and macrophages_FLC", "Neutrophils and macrophages_NML",
               "Lymphocytes_FLC", "Lymphocytes_NML",
               "Cholangiocyte cells_FLC", "Cholangiocyte cells_NML",
               "Unknown_FLC", "Unknown_NML")

avg_expression.rc <- SetIdent(avg_expression.rc, value = new_order)
avg_expression.log <- SetIdent(avg_expression.log, value = new_order)
avg_expression.clr <- SetIdent(avg_expression.clr, value = new_order)
```

```{r}
p1 <- DoHeatmap(avg_expression.clr, features = features, draw.lines = FALSE, group.by = "ident", size = 4)
p2 <- DoHeatmap(avg_expression.log, features = features, draw.lines = FALSE, group.by = "ident", size = 4)
p3 <- DoHeatmap(avg_expression.rc, features = features, draw.lines = FALSE, group.by = "ident", size = 4)
```

```{r}
png("./revisedDataset/manuscript/figure2/Heatmap_clr.png", width = 17, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
p1
dev.off()
```

```{r}
png("./revisedDataset/manuscript/figure2/Heatmap_log.png", width = 17, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
p2
dev.off()
```

```{r}
png("./revisedDataset/manuscript/figure2/Heatmap_rc.png", width = 17, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
p3
dev.off()
```
### Heatmap using sc heatmap

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- SetIdent(harmonized.seurat, value = new_order)
```


```{r}
p4 <- DoHeatmap(subset(harmonized.seurat, downsample = 100), features = features, size = 3)
```
```{r}
png("./revisedDataset/manuscript/figure2/sc_heatmap.png", width = 17, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
p4
dev.off()
```



#### Dittoseq using avg expression seurat

```{r}
avg_expression <- AverageExpression(harmonized.seurat, return.seurat = TRUE)
```


```{r}
hm <- dittoHeatmap(avg_expression, features = features,
    annot.by = c("cluster_named", "status"))
```

### Heatmap using complexheatmap

```{r}
markers <- read_csv("./revisedDataset/cell_type_assignment/FLCvNML_HighlyEnrichedMarkers_CLUSTERNAMED_logFC.25_wilcox.csv")
marker_genes <- markers$gene
```

```{r}
expression_matrix <- GetAssayData(harmonized.seurat, slot = "counts")[marker_genes, ]
```

### Violin plot

```{r}
p <- VlnPlot(harmonized.seurat, features = c("SLC16A14", "VCAN", "CD68"), split.by = "status")
```

```{r}
dir.create("./revisedDataset/violinPlots")
```

```{r}
ggsave("./revisedDataset/violinPlots/violinPlots.png", dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 5)
```

```{r}
for (gene in c("EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "FYN", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "NPPB","CYP3A4", "RPS21","RPL4","S100A4","CFL1","TMSB4X","B2M","ACTG1","EEF1B2","COX7C","HNRNPA1","PARP8","MALAT1","CST7","COX4I1","ID2","ARHGAP15","CELF2","PTPRC","RPS27","UQCRB","RPS3","PPIA","TMSB10","FYN", "HNF4A")) {
  VlnPlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, split.by = "status")
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/violinPlots/", proj_name, "_", gene, "_violinPlot.png"), units = "in", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```



## Figure 4

## Cluster profiler by cell type and status

```{r Load markers}
markers <- read.csv("./revisedDataset/FLCvNML_DEG_clusterNamed_FLCvsNML-MAST.csv") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(avg_log2FC >= 0.5 | avg_log2FC <= -0.5, p_val_adj <= 0.05)
```

```{r Generate EntrezID in markers dataframe}
geneid <- markers$gene
markers$entrezid <- AnnotationDbi::select(org.Hs.eg.db,
                                          keys = geneid, 
                                          columns = "ENTREZID", 
                                          keytype = "SYMBOL")
```

```{r Generate cluster list by celltype and status}
cluster_names <- levels(harmonized.seurat)
clusterprofilerlist <- list()

# Loop over each cluster name
for (cluster_name in cluster_names) {
  # Subset the genes based on the current cluster for FLC (avg_log2FC >= 0.5)
  cluster_genes_flc <- subset(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID, markers$cluster == cluster_name & markers$avg_log2FC >= 0.5)[1:100]
  
  # Store the subset of genes in the list using the cluster name as the key with the addition of "-FLC"
  clusterprofilerlist[[paste0(cluster_name, "-FLC")]] <- cluster_genes_flc

  # Subset the genes based on the current cluster for NML (avg_log2FC <= -0.5)
  cluster_genes_nml <- subset(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID, markers$cluster == cluster_name & markers$avg_log2FC <= -0.5)[1:100]

  # Store the subset of genes in the list using the cluster name as the key with the addition of "-NML"
  clusterprofilerlist[[paste0(cluster_name, "-NML")]] <- cluster_genes_nml
}
```

```{r Complete case}
# Create an empty list to store the results
clusterprofilerlist <- list()

# Loop over each cluster name
for (cluster_name in cluster_names) {
  # Subset the genes based on the current cluster for FLC (avg_log2FC >= 0.5) and skip "NA" entries
  cluster_genes_flc <- subset(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID, 
                              markers$cluster == cluster_name & 
                              markers$avg_log2FC >= 0.5 & 
                              complete.cases(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID))[1:100]
  
  # Store the subset of genes in the list using the cluster name as the key with the addition of "-FLC"
  clusterprofilerlist[[paste0(cluster_name, "-FLC")]] <- cluster_genes_flc

  # Subset the genes based on the current cluster for NML (avg_log2FC <= -0.5) and skip "NA" entries
  cluster_genes_nml <- subset(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID, 
                              markers$cluster == cluster_name & 
                              markers$avg_log2FC <= -0.5 & 
                              complete.cases(markers$entrezid$ENTREZID))[1:100]

  # Store the subset of genes in the list using the cluster name as the key with the addition of "-NML"
  clusterprofilerlist[[paste0(cluster_name, "-NML")]] <- cluster_genes_nml
}
```

### Epithelial 2 cluster comparison

```{r Epi 2 - GO}
cc.go <- clusterProfiler::compareCluster(geneClusters = clusterprofilerlist[3:4],
                                         fun = "enrichGO", 
                                         OrgDb= org.Hs.eg.db, 
                                         ont= "BP",
                                         pvalueCutoff=0.05, 
                                         pAdjustMethod='BH')
dotplot(cc.go, showCategory = 5) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1, size = 10, face = "bold")) + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)) + 
  scale_color_viridis(direction = -1, trans="log10") 

ggsave("./revisedDataset/clusterProfiler/clusterProfiler_clusterCompare_Epi2_GO_log2FC0.5-completeCase.png", width = 11, height = 30, units = "in")

write.csv(cc.go@compareClusterResult, "./revisedDataset/clusterProfiler/clusterProfiler_clusterCompare_GO_Epi2_log2FC0.5-completeCase.csv")
```

```{r Epi 2 - GOS}
cc.gos <- clusterProfiler::simplify(cc.go, cutoff=0.05, by= "p.adjust")
dotplot(cc.gos, showCategory = 5) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1, size = 10, face = "bold")) + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)) + 
  scale_color_viridis(direction = -1, trans="log10") 
ggsave("./revisedDataset/clusterProfiler/clusterProfiler_Epi2_GOSimplified_log2FC0.5-completeCase.png", width = 11, height = 11, units = "in")
```

```{r Epi 2 - PW}
cc.pw <- clusterProfiler::compareCluster(geneClusters = clusterprofilerlist[3:4],
                                         fun = "enrichPathway",
                                         pvalueCutoff=0.05, 
                                         pAdjustMethod='BH')

dotplot(cc.pw, showCategory = 5) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1, size = 10, face = "bold")) + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)) + 
  scale_color_viridis(direction = -1, trans="log10") 
ggsave("./revisedDataset/clusterProfiler/clusterProfiler_enrichPathway_Epi2-log2FC0.5-completeCase.png", width = 11, height = 11, units = "in")

write.csv(cc.pw@compareClusterResult, "./revisedDataset/clusterProfiler/clusterProfiler_enrichPathway_Epi2_log2FC0.5-completeCase.csv")
```

### Supplementary

#### S3
```{r}
CellsMeta <-harmonized.seurat@meta.data
CellsMeta.m <- merge(CellsMeta, patient.id.status, by = "id", all.x = TRUE) 
rownames(CellsMeta.m) <- rownames(CellsMeta)
```

```{r}
sample_annotations <- c(unique(harmonized.seurat$id))
harmonized.seurat <- AddMetaData(object = harmonized.seurat, metadata = CellsMeta.m)
```

#### Metadata

```{r}
p1 <- DimPlot(harmonized.seurat, group.by = "Patient.Status", raster = FALSE, cols = c("#0072B2", #1
                             "#D55E00", #2
                             "#009E73", #3
                             "#CC79A7",  #4
                             "#926B40", #5
                             "#56B4E9", #6
                             "#E69F00",#7
                             "#F0E442", #8
                             "#9983BD", #9
                             "#3BBCA8", #10
                             "#8A9FD1")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.margin = margin(2.5, 3, 2.5, 2.5),
        legend.text=element_text(size=7)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title=NULL,
                              ncol=3, 
                              nrow=4,
                              override.aes = list(size = 6, shape = "square")))

p2 <- DimPlot(harmonized.seurat, group.by = "status", raster = FALSE, cols = c("#272E6A",
                               "#89288F"), split.by = "status") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.margin = margin(2.5, 3, 2.5, 2.5),
        legend.text=element_text(size=7)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title=NULL,
                              ncol = 2, 
                              nrow = 1,
                              override.aes = list(size = 6, shape = "square"))) 
widths <- c(1, 1)

aligned_plots <- plot_grid(p1, p2, align = "v",  axis = "l", rel_widths = widths, rel_heights = heights, nrow = 1)
ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/metadata/harmony/", proj_name, "_umap_clusterNamed-nonraster.png"), units = 'in', width = 10, height = 6.5, dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
p1
ggsave("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/metadata/harmony/Patient_UMAP.png", units = "in", width = 6, height = 7, dpi = 600)
p2
ggsave("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/metadata/harmony/Status_UMAP.png", units = "in", width = 6, height = 6.5, dpi = 600)

```
